legs.label: Validate confirmed inputs
legs.description: AX proves the bundle is EL4-confirmed, the lexicon loads, and source manifest hashes match.
legs.lead: No atomization starts until the confirmed library gate holds.
beats: Checks the bundle through the Ledger-derived library.confirmed gate.
Validates every source document hash in the EL1 manifest.

legs.label: Draft shelf-constrained plan
legs.description: Raven resolves source candidates to confirmed stubs and lexicon names, or emits gap reports.
legs.lead: Triage may not create shelves, categories, or names.
beats: Produces write_new only for an existing confirmed stub and lexicon prefLabel.
Produces gap_report when shelf or lexicon support is missing.
Keeps covered_existing, defer_human, and reject separate.

legs.label: Validate plan
legs.description: AX validates the build-plan schema and rechecks stub and lexicon matches.
legs.lead: The schema rejects category-derived folders and off-lexicon names.
beats: Checks planned source ranges against current source hashes.

legs.label: Render coverage audit
legs.description: AX reports filled contracts, gap reports, deferrals, rejects, and shelf-fit findings.
legs.lead: The audit is the director-readable accounting for EL5.
beats: Counts write_new contracts and gap reports.
Lists source documents with no emitted candidate.
Keeps gap reports as reports, not markdown cards.
